summary: REQ-1 appears implemented: the Final CTA secondary button label is changed to “Subscription plans” and wired to navigate to a new Subscription Plans view via client-side state (no full reload). REQ-2 is mostly implemented with a new Subscription Plans page and a free-first-session callout plus a go-back control, but at least one acceptance-criteria string/price is not exact (₹1600 is rendered as “₹1,600”).

missing_requirements.requirement: The Subscription Plans page shows three plans with prices exactly: “₹200”, “₹800”, and “₹1600”.
missing_requirements.reason: The quarterly plan price is shown as “₹1,600” (with a comma), which does not exactly match the required “₹1600”.

hallucinated_features.description: “Most Popular” highlighting/badge and additional plan feature bullet lists beyond the requested plan/price/time display.
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest only asks to display three plans with specified prices/descriptions and a free-session note; it does not request popularity labeling or extended feature lists.

hallucinated_features.description: Browser history integration via pushState/popstate for view switching.
hallucinated_features.reason: Not explicitly requested; navigation without full reload was required, but history state handling is an extra behavior.
